title: QUIC Hosted Interop-Runner Handshake Corroboration Verification
verification_method: Workflow review, local helper dry-run, local helper execution, artifact inspection, and SpecTrace validation.
preconditions: Docker is available on the local machine for the local helper replay.
Python 3 is available for the external runner checkout.
The local runner checkout exists at `C:\src\quic-interop\quic-interop-runner`.

Hosted dispatch requires GitHub Actions access, a current `quic-interop-runner` checkout from the public runner repository, Docker Engine 28.1 or later for the runner compose file, Python 3.12 for the runner dependency set, and Wireshark packet-analysis tools for the runner post-check.
scope: Verify that the repository defines a manual hosted lane for the narrow server-role `handshake` helper cell, keeps the lane outside ordinary CI gates, uploads artifacts regardless of helper outcome, and preserves the helper's advisory classification boundary without claiming broad interop readiness.
procedure: Review `.github/workflows/interop-runner-handshake.yml` and confirm it is `workflow_dispatch` only.
Confirm the workflow checks out this repository and the external `quic-interop-runner` checkout as separate workspaces.
Confirm the workflow invokes `scripts/interop/Invoke-QuicInteropRunner.ps1` with `-LocalRole server`, `-PeerImplementationSlots quic-go`, `-TestCases handshake`, and an explicit `-RunnerRoot` path.
Confirm the workflow uploads the full `artifacts/interop-runner/` tree with `if: always()` so helper failures and advisory outcomes still preserve evidence.
Run the helper in dry-run mode for the same server-role handshake shape.
Run the helper locally for the same server-role handshake shape and inspect the preserved artifact bundle.
Run SpecTrace validation after adding the canonical requirement, design, work-item, and verification artifacts.
Dispatch `.github/workflows/interop-runner-handshake.yml` manually and inspect the uploaded artifact bundle.
expected_result: The manual workflow is available for hosted artifact collection, remains outside ordinary CI, invokes the same narrow helper shape proven locally, and preserves uploaded evidence on success, advisory, or failure. A hosted dispatch for the narrow server-role `handshake` helper cell passes and uploads the runner artifact bundle. This does not claim general interop readiness.
status_summary: Passed for the repository configuration slice on 2026-04-29 and for the narrow hosted corroboration lane on 2026-04-30. The dry-run resolved to server-role `nginx` replacement against quic-go for `handshake`; the real local helper run built the harness image, invoked the runner, exited successfully with an advisory, and preserved `artifacts/interop-runner/20260429-170106187-server-nginx/` after the upstream runner post-check failed. Hosted GitHub Actions run 25141407138 passed on commit 2d869bdf0095a45cecadf2a34f920480bf4309b9; its runner report recorded `handshake` as `succeeded` for the narrow `nginx` replacement server versus quic-go client cell and uploaded the runner artifact bundle.

supplemental_sections.heading: Deferred Coverage
supplemental_sections.content: No broad matrix, no runner registry change, no protocol runtime change, no public API change, and no interop-ready claim are covered by this verification.
